queries.question: What are names of blues songs sung by Bessie Smith and folk songs sung by her too?
queries.sql:
SELECT Blues_Song.song_name
FROM Singer JOIN Blues_Song ON Singer.id = Blues_Song.Singer_id
WHERE Singer.Name = "Bessie Smith"
UNION
SELECT Folk_Song.song_name
FROM Singer JOIN Folk_Song ON Singer.id = Folk_Song.Singer_id
WHERE Singer.Name = "Bessie Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?singer a :Singer .
    ?blues_song a :Blues_Song .
    ?blues_song p:hasSinger ?singer .
    ?blues_song p:Song_Name ?song_name .
    ?singer p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Bessie Smith")
    BIND(?song_name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?singer a :Singer .
    ?folk_song a :Folk_Song .
    ?folk_song p:hasSinger ?singer .
    ?folk_song p:Song_Name ?song_name .
    ?singer p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Bessie Smith")
    BIND(?song_name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: List names of blues songs and also list names of folk songs sung by Bessie Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Blues_Song.song_name
FROM Singer JOIN Blues_Song ON Singer.id = Blues_Song.Singer_id
UNION
SELECT Folk_Song.song_name
FROM Singer JOIN Folk_Song ON Singer.id = Folk_Song.Singer_id
WHERE Singer.Name = "Bessie Smith"

ambiguous_dsl.question: List names of blues songs and folk songs that are sung by Bessie Smith.
